title: Automatic indices cause undesirable type conversions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', CAST('20.5' AS FLOAT));
UPDATE test_table SET value = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Automatic indices trigger undesirable type conversions
